meta.title: Our Process | Armature Wealth Office
meta.description: A deliberate, phased process: diagnostic conversation, system design, implementation, and ongoing governance.

hero.heading: Designed around your life. Not sold into it.

intro.body1: Armature does not begin with a product or a portfolio. It begins with a diagnostic conversation — a structured review of where things stand, what is working, and where the system has gaps.
intro.body2: From there, the process follows a deliberate sequence: understand, design, implement, and govern. Each phase builds on the one before. Nothing is rushed. Nothing is sold.

phases.title: Diagnostic Conversation
phases.body: A focused, confidential conversation to understand your current financial landscape — assets, entities, advisors, goals, and concerns. No pitch. No commitment. Just clarity on where things stand.
phases.outcome: A clear picture of complexity, coordination gaps, and whether Armature is the right fit.

phases.title: Wealth Architecture Review
phases.body: A comprehensive review of your entire financial ecosystem — investment accounts, entity structures, insurance policies, estate documents, tax returns, and advisor relationships. Every element is mapped and assessed for alignment.
phases.outcome: A written assessment identifying structural gaps, inefficiencies, and integration opportunities.

phases.title: Operating System Design
phases.body: Based on the review, we design your wealth operating system — a governing framework that defines how capital is allocated, how advisors are coordinated, how decisions are made, and how risk is managed across the entire ecosystem.
phases.outcome: A written operating plan with clear decision rights, advisor responsibilities, and governance rules.

phases.title: Implementation
phases.body: The operating system is built and activated — accounts restructured, advisors aligned, policies updated, entities reviewed, and reporting established. Implementation is methodical, not rushed.
phases.outcome: A fully operational wealth system with integrated oversight and clear reporting.

phases.title: Ongoing Governance
phases.body: The system is maintained, monitored, and evolved. Quarterly reviews, annual reassessments, and real-time coordination across all domains. The system carries the load. You retain authority.
phases.outcome: Continuous integration, reduced principal burden, and a system that adapts as your life evolves.

closing.heading: The system does the work. You retain the authority.
closing.body: Most of what you currently track, coordinate, and worry about was never meant to live in your head. Armature exists to hold it — so you can focus on the decisions that only you can make.
